event: After the Audience in a Roman Palace
description: A detailed scene set in a grand Roman palace interior. A wide marble staircase descends from an arched opening through which Roman figures in red and white togas process. At right, a large white marble statue of a Roman figure stands on a pedestal with an outstretched arm. Groups of people in classical dress gather at the base of the stairs and around the statue. The floor features elaborate mosaic patterns. The architecture is rendered with meticulous attention to marble textures, columns, and classical detailing. The overall impression is of imperial grandeur and ceremonial occasion.
